title: stelis sanguinea
intro: Stelis sanguinea is a type of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, specifically in the countries of Mexico, Costa Rica, and Panama. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stelis sanguinea include its potential to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of Stelis sanguinea include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to extract its medicinal compounds and utilize them for therapeutic purposes.
